sub_modules.nr_poly_eval_fixed: Combinational fixed-point cubic polynomial evaluator using Horner form.
sub_modules.nr_derivative_eval_fixed: Combinational fixed-point derivative evaluator for a1 + 2*a2*x + 3*a3*x^2.
sub_modules.nr_fixed_divide: Combinational signed fixed-point divider that computes p(x)/p'(x) with extended scaling and zero-denominator protection.
sub_modules.nr_update_step: Combinational Newton update block that produces x_next = x - step and holds x when the derivative is zero.
sub_modules.nr_output_convert: Combinational converter from internal high-precision fixed-point format to the external WIDTH/FRAC format with truncation toward zero.
sub_modules.nr_root_verify: Combinational residual tolerance checker for the final polynomial value.
